test.name: TC_001 Login With Performance Glitch User

kw.name: Given I am on the login page
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Wait For Elements State' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Wait For Elements State' found.

kw.doc: Ensures the login page is displayed
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Wait For Elements State' found.

kw.name: When I login with the performance glitch user
kw.doc: Logs in with performance_glitch_user

kw.name: Then I should be redirected to the products page
kw.doc: Verifies the products page is loaded

test.doc: Verifies login with performance_glitch_user redirects to products page
test.status: No keyword with name 'Wait For Elements State' found.

test.name: TC_002 Sort Products By Price High To Low

kw.name: Given I am logged in as a standard user
Login With User
Enter Username
Fill Text
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.doc: Fills the username field
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.name: Enter Password
kw.doc: Fills the password field

kw.name: Click Login Button
kw.doc: Clicks the login button
Logs in with the provided username and password
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.name: Verify On Products Page
kw.doc: Verifies the products page is loaded
Logs in as standard user and verifies products page
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.name: When I sort products by price high to low
kw.doc: Sorts the products by price high to low

kw.name: Then the products should be ordered from highest to lowest price
kw.doc: Verifies the prices are in descending order

test.doc: Verifies products are sorted from highest to lowest price
test.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

test.name: TC_003 Add Multiple Products To Cart

kw.name: Given I am logged in as a standard user
Login With User
Enter Username
Fill Text
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.doc: Fills the username field
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.name: Enter Password
kw.doc: Fills the password field

kw.name: Click Login Button
kw.doc: Clicks the login button
Logs in with the provided username and password
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.name: Verify On Products Page
kw.doc: Verifies the products page is loaded
Logs in as standard user and verifies products page
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.name: When I add three different products to the cart
kw.doc: Adds three products to the cart

kw.name: Then the cart badge should display three items
kw.doc: Verifies the cart badge shows three

test.doc: Verifies that three products can be added to the cart
test.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

test.name: TC_004 Remove Product From Cart

kw.name: Given I am logged in as a standard user
Login With User
Enter Username
Fill Text
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.doc: Fills the username field
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.name: Enter Password
kw.doc: Fills the password field

kw.name: Click Login Button
kw.doc: Clicks the login button
Logs in with the provided username and password
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.name: Verify On Products Page
kw.doc: Verifies the products page is loaded
Logs in as standard user and verifies products page
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.name: And I have added a product to the cart
kw.doc: Adds a single product to the cart

kw.name: When I open the cart and remove the product
kw.doc: Opens the cart and removes the product

kw.name: Then the cart should be empty
kw.doc: Verifies the cart has no items

test.doc: Verifies that a product can be removed from the cart
test.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

test.name: TC_005 Validate Required Checkout Fields

kw.name: Given I am logged in as a standard user
Login With User
Enter Username
Fill Text
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.doc: Fills the username field
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.name: Enter Password
kw.doc: Fills the password field

kw.name: Click Login Button
kw.doc: Clicks the login button
Logs in with the provided username and password
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.name: Verify On Products Page
kw.doc: Verifies the products page is loaded
Logs in as standard user and verifies products page
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.name: And I have added a product to the cart
kw.doc: Adds a single product to the cart

kw.name: When I proceed to checkout and continue without filling fields
kw.doc: Opens cart, checkout and continues without data

kw.name: Then a required field error should be displayed
kw.doc: Verifies the checkout error message

test.doc: Verifies error message when checkout fields are empty
test.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

test.name: TC_006 Complete Order Successfully

kw.name: Given I am logged in as a standard user
Login With User
Enter Username
Fill Text
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.doc: Fills the username field

kw.doc: Clicks the login button
Logs in with the provided username and password

kw.name: Verify On Products Page
kw.doc: Verifies the products page is loaded
Logs in as standard user and verifies products page
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.

kw.name: And I have added a product to the cart
kw.doc: Adds a single product to the cart

kw.name: When I complete the checkout with valid information
kw.doc: Completes the checkout flow with valid data

kw.name: Then the order confirmation message should be displayed
kw.doc: Verifies the order completion message

test.doc: Verifies a complete order flow finishes successfully
test.status: No keyword with name 'Fill Text' found.
